titleStmt.title: SII 42.300: original edition by C Somasundara Rao
No. 300. (A.R. No. 68 of 1956-57.) Donakoṇḍa, Darsi Taluk, Nellore District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a slab set up in the temple of Gangamma.
Dated Śaka 13[49] Plavaṅga, Māgha śu. 15, Thursday, corresponding to A.D. 1428, February 1. The weekday however was Sunday.

Records the renewal of some cash grant (details lost) made to the goddess Nūkalā-Paramēśvarī of Donakoṇḍa on a former date (Kārttika, śu. 1), by Rāmayadēva-mahārāja, son of aṁtyambaragaṇḍa Gumuṇḍūri Kāmayadēva-mahārāja. Donakoṇḍa is stated to be situated in Pina-Ēṟuva, the nāyaṅkara territory of the donor. (See N.D.I., Part I, Darśi 23, p. 319).
[The N.D.I., gives the text running up to line 35, while by the time when the impressions were taken by the Epigraphical branch, the part relating to lines 20-35 had faded].

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p: Figures of Crescent moon and sun.

śubhamastu . svasti śrī
śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1349
Agunēṁṭi plavaṁga saṁvatsa
ra māgha śu 15 gu śrīmaṁ
nmahāmaṁḍalēśvara rājādhi
rāja rājaparamēśvara śrī vīra
pratāpa dēvarāya mahārāyala
kuṁ buṇyamugānu śrīmanmahāma
ṁḍalēśvara Aṁtyaṁbaragaṁḍa gu
muḍūri kāmayadēva mahārā
jula kumāruṁḍu rāmayadēva
mahārājulu pinayēṟuvalō
nu tamanāyaṁkaṟānakuṁjellē do
nakoṁḍa nūkalā paramēśvariki I
ccina dhaṁ(dha)¨rmmaśāsanaṁ [.] pū¨rvvāna Aṁma
ṁgārini rājyaṁ vāriyēṁḍā di
1 kiṁbeṭṭē [Aṁ]tta saṁvatsa
ra kā¨rttika śu 1 Ārabhyaṁgānu
ṁttara roḍi dumā pu
Digital edition of SII 42.300 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
